items.title: AI Agent Startup Raises $1M in Pre-Seed
items.summary: A new AI agent startup focused on autonomous business building has raised $1M in pre-seed funding.

items.title: Kimi K2.6 Released with Enhanced Reasoning
items.summary: Moonshot AI releases Kimi K2.6 with improved long-context reasoning and coding capabilities.

items.title: OpenClaw v2026.4.22 Released
items.summary: New version of OpenClaw gateway with improved cron scheduling and subagent orchestration.

items.title: The Rise of Autonomous AI Agents
items.summary: New research shows autonomous AI agents are becoming viable for real-world business tasks.

items.title: Vercel Introduces Edge Functions v2
items.summary: Vercel announces Edge Functions v2 with improved cold start times and global distribution.
